message:
fix(sync): HashSet collision avoidance and prefix normalization in import

Three improvements to import_from_jsonl:

1. Replace O(n) linear scans during rename-on-import with HashSet
   lookups.  Previously, collision detection iterated over all issues
   and all accumulated renames on every candidate ID.  Now:
   - mismatch_set (HashSet) replaces Vec::contains for filtering
   - occupied_ids (HashSet) merges non-renamed issue IDs + storage IDs
   - generated_ids (HashSet) tracks newly generated IDs
   The exists() closure drops from O(issues + renames) to O(1).

2. Normalize trailing hyphens in id_matches_expected_prefix.  When
   a repo prefix is stored as "bd-" (with trailing separator), the
   comparison against parsed.prefix (which strips the separator)
   would always fail.  Now trim_end_matches('-') is applied before
   comparing, so "bd-" and "bd" both match.

3. Cosmetic: reformat the orphan-cleanup SQL string for the
   dependencies/depends_on_id case to satisfy rustfmt line limits
   (no behavioral change).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
